title: Cuando el mundo se acabe te seguiré amando
original_title: Cuando el mundo se acabe te seguiré amando
overview: Natalia, a successful painter, and Hugo, a writer in a creative rut, are going through a rough patch in their relationship. After Hugo moves out in an attempt to finish his novel, Natalia is determined to do whatever it takes to reunite with him.
